## ⚠️ Important

**Do not use this template for public disclosure of vulnerabilities.**  
Email security concerns directly to maintainers. See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).

This template is for internal tracking of security-related improvements only.

## Type

- [ ] Security guidance correction in skill content
- [ ] Supply chain / repository concern
- [ ] Other (describe)

Brief description (avoid sensitive details).
